metadata.thoughts:
**Clarifying guaranteed times**

I need to set the "locationType" to null if it’s either NATIONAL or unspecified. There’s also a section about guaranteed times, but I'm confused about the actual time ranges. The text mentions departures before and after the strike, but doesn't specify guaranteed times during the strike hours of 09:00-13:00. I’ve noted some departure times, but the guaranteedTimes field is supposed to be in "HH:mm-HH:mm" ranges. I'll need to sort this out!
